<!-- Generated by AI on 05/04/2026 -->

# Technical Specification

This is the technical specification for the spec detailed in .agent-os/specs/2026-05-04-phase-3-pattern-detection/spec.md

## Technical Requirements

### Analysis Architecture

All analysis runs in application memory. The `GET /api/insights` endpoint loads the user's thought history via `IThoughtRepository.GetByUserAsync` (all pages), passes the collection through a pipeline of analyzers, and returns insight messages. No new storage tables or indices are required.

### Domain Models

```
InsightMessage: string Category, string Message, double Confidence (0.0–1.0), DateTimeOffset GeneratedAt
PatternAnalysisContext: IReadOnlyList<ThoughtEntry> Thoughts (all user thoughts for time window)
```

### Frequency Analysis Engine

- Interface: `IFrequencyAnalyzer` with method `IReadOnlyList<InsightMessage> Analyze(PatternAnalysisContext context)`
- Calculates per-tag entry counts over the analysis window; computes percentage share for each tag
- Generates insight when: a single tag accounts for ≥ 25% of total thoughts → "Trading is your most frequent thought category this week (38% of thoughts)"
- Generates insight when: a tag appears ≥ 5 times in the window → "[Tag] has appeared frequently in your thoughts lately"
- Configurable time window (default: 7 days) via `appsettings.json` under `PatternDetection:FrequencyWindowDays`

### Time-Based Trend Detection

- Interface: `ITimeTrendAnalyzer` with method `IReadOnlyList<InsightMessage> Analyze(PatternAnalysisContext context)`
- Groups thoughts by hour-of-day (0–23); calculates negative sentiment count per hour bucket
- Generates insight when: a 4-hour window has ≥ 60% negative sentiment → "Negative thoughts peak between 6 PM and 10 PM"
- Groups thoughts by day-of-week; identifies days with highest thought volume
- Generates insight for peak activity day: "You log the most thoughts on [DayName]"

### Repetition Detection

- Interface: `IRepetitionDetector` with method `IReadOnlyList<InsightMessage> Analyze(PatternAnalysisContext context)`
- Tokenizes each thought's text via `ITextPreprocessor`; computes Jaccard similarity between all thought pairs
- Jaccard similarity: `|intersection(A, B)| / |union(A, B)|`
- Clusters thoughts with similarity ≥ configurable threshold (default: 0.3) using a simple union-find approach
- Generates insight when a cluster has ≥ 3 members: "You've logged similar thoughts about [top shared keywords] [N] times"
- Configurable threshold via `appsettings.json` under `PatternDetection:RepetitionSimilarityThreshold`
- Uses `StringBuilder` for building cluster summary strings

### Trigger Identification

- Interface: `ITriggerIdentifier` with method `IReadOnlyList<InsightMessage> Analyze(PatternAnalysisContext context)`
- For each tag domain, calculates: (negative thought count with that tag) / (total thoughts with that tag)
- Generates insight when a tag domain has ≥ 50% negative sentiment rate and ≥ 3 entries: "Many of your [Tag]-related thoughts carry a negative tone — this domain may be a stress trigger"
- Cross-domain: if Stress tag co-occurs with another tag ≥ 60% of the time → "[Tag] frequently appears alongside stress-related thoughts"

### Insight Generation Layer (Orchestrator)

- Interface: `IInsightService` with method `Task<IReadOnlyList<InsightMessage>> GetInsightsAsync(string userId)`
- Implementation: `InsightService` — fetches all user thoughts, constructs `PatternAnalysisContext`, runs all 4 analyzers, deduplicates insights, sorts by `Confidence` descending, returns top 10
- Returns empty list (not an error) when user has < 10 thoughts (configurable minimum via `PatternDetection:MinimumThoughtsForInsights`)
- All analyzers registered as singletons; `InsightService` registered as scoped

### API

- New controller: `InsightsController` in `Controllers/Insights/InsightsController.cs`
- `[ApiController]`, `[Authorize]`, `[Route("api/insights")]`
- Single action: `GetInsightsAsync` — calls `IInsightService`, maps to response DTO

### Frontend

- New `InsightsPanel` component in `frontend/src/components/`
- Uses `useQuery` to call `GET /api/insights`; renders a MUI `List` of insight messages; each item has an icon based on category
- Show empty state message when `< 10 thoughts` (API returns empty array)
- `InsightsPanel` rendered below `ThoughtList` on `ThoughtsPage` or on a dedicated `/insights` route
